brand.name: Jude
brand.tagline: Home, Health, and Happiness on the wall.
brand.positioning: A warm, wall-mounted AI companion that helps older adults live safer, healthier, and happier at home while giving families peace of mind.
brand.tone: Apple-inspired clarity with less sleekness and more Southern charm: calm, confident, neighborly, warm, practical, family-first, porch-light friendly.
voice_rules: Make each section feel like a product benefit, not a technical feature list.
Talk about dignity, independence, family, home, and comfort.
Avoid scary surveillance language; use supportive language like check-ins, gentle reminders, and peace of mind.
Avoid making medical claims; say supports, reminds, helps, encourages, or coordinates.
Use plain English for adult children researching help for aging parents.

pages.title: Aging in Place
pages.meta_description: See how Jude helps older adults stay independent at home with daily support, family connection, safety check-ins, and simple wall-mounted AI.

pages.title: Medication Reminders
pages.meta_description: Jude helps seniors remember medications, confirm doses, track refills, and keep caregivers informed when routines are missed.

pages.title: Fall Prevention and Emergency Help
pages.meta_description: Explore how Jude supports safer movement, emergency voice help, nighttime lighting, fall-risk routines, and family alerts for seniors at home.

pages.title: Smart Home Control
pages.meta_description: Jude makes smart home technology easier for seniors with voice control for lights, locks, thermostat, cameras, reminders, and safety routines.
pages.audience: Seniors and families simplifying smart homes

pages.title: Family Connection
pages.primary_keyword: AI companion for elderly family connection
pages.meta_description: Jude helps seniors stay close to family with video calls, photo sharing, voice messages, shared calendars, and simple family check-ins.

pages.title: Caregiver Peace of Mind
pages.meta_description: Jude gives families and caregivers better daily visibility with check-ins, routine updates, missed-reminder alerts, and simple care coordination.

pages.title: Dementia and Memory Support
pages.meta_description: Jude supports seniors with memory loss through orientation prompts, repeated-question support, routine reminders, reassurance, and family alerts.

pages.title: Health Check-Ins
pages.meta_description: Jude can support daily health check-ins for pain, sleep, hydration, appetite, mood, dizziness, movement, and symptom trends.

pages.title: Chronic Condition Support
pages.primary_keyword: AI support for senior chronic conditions
pages.meta_description: Jude helps seniors manage daily routines around blood pressure, diabetes, heart health, COPD, arthritis, mobility, and recovery support.

pages.title: Nutrition and Hydration
pages.meta_description: Jude supports healthier daily routines with meal reminders, hydration prompts, grocery lists, simple recipes, and family visibility around skipped meals.
pages.audience: Families worried about eating and drinking

pages.title: Sleep and Nighttime Support
pages.primary_keyword: nighttime support for seniors at home
pages.meta_description: Jude helps seniors feel safer at night with bedtime routines, soft lighting, lock checks, calming audio, and nighttime caregiver alerts.

pages.title: Companionship and Loneliness
pages.meta_description: Jude helps reduce loneliness with conversation, music, memories, family messages, jokes, stories, daily greetings, and emotional check-ins.

pages.title: Telehealth and Doctor Visits
pages.meta_description: Jude helps seniors prepare for doctor visits, join telehealth appointments, remember care instructions, and share health summaries with family.

pages.title: Home Safety and Security
pages.meta_description: Jude supports home safety with door checks, lock reminders, smoke and carbon monoxide alerts, doorbell cameras, water leak alerts, and emergency contacts.

pages.title: Fraud and Scam Protection
pages.meta_description: Jude can help seniors slow down suspicious calls, texts, emails, payment requests, and common scams by encouraging family confirmation.

pages.title: Daily Routines
pages.meta_description: Jude helps seniors move through the day with morning, meal, medication, appointment, chore, pet care, and bedtime routines.

pages.title: Transportation and Appointments
pages.meta_description: Jude helps seniors remember appointments, know when to leave, coordinate rides, prepare questions, and notify family when transportation is needed.

pages.title: Remote Patient Monitoring
pages.primary_keyword: remote patient monitoring for seniors at home
pages.meta_description: Jude can support remote patient monitoring by helping seniors collect readings, remember checks, and share trends with caregivers or providers.

pages.title: Home Maintenance
pages.meta_description: Jude helps seniors and families stay ahead of household tasks like filters, batteries, trash day, leaks, bills, mail, and appliance reminders.

pages.title: Spiritual and Community Life
pages.meta_description: Jude helps seniors stay connected to church, community events, hobbies, friends, local programs, and meaningful routines.

pages.title: Pet Care Support
pages.meta_description: Jude helps seniors care for pets with feeding reminders, walking prompts, medication schedules, vet appointments, and family updates.

pages.title: Design and Wall-Mounted Benefits
pages.meta_description: Why Jude is wall-mounted: always visible, always powered, easy to read, hard to misplace, voice-first, and designed to blend into the home.

pages.title: Entertainment and Happiness
pages.meta_description: Jude brings joy into the day with music, stories, radio, games, audiobooks, jokes, family photos, and personalized greetings.

pages.title: Privacy and Trust
pages.meta_description: Jude should be built around trust, consent, approved contacts, clear privacy settings, meaningful alerts, and respectful support for seniors.

pages.title: The Family Dashboard
pages.meta_description: Jude’s family dashboard can help adult children view reminders, check-ins, appointments, caregiver notes, alerts, and daily routines in one place.

pages.title: Why Jude Is Different
pages.primary_keyword: best AI companion for seniors at home
pages.meta_description: Jude combines a wall-mounted screen, AI companionship, smart home control, health routines, family connection, and caregiver peace of mind.

pages.title: Voice Assistant for Elderly Parents

pages.title: Senior-Friendly Technology
pages.meta_description: Jude makes technology senior-friendly with a wall-mounted screen, voice-first controls, large text, simple routines, and warm family-centered design.

pages.title: Home Benefits
pages.meta_description: Explore Jude’s home benefits for seniors, including smart home control, safety routines, door checks, lighting, home maintenance, and daily reminders.

pages.meta_description: Jude supports senior health routines with medication reminders, hydration, meals, symptom notes, chronic condition routines, telehealth, and caregiver updates.

pages.title: Happiness Benefits
pages.meta_description: Jude supports senior happiness through family connection, music, memories, photos, hobbies, community reminders, conversation, and companionship.

pages.title: Family Benefits
pages.meta_description: Jude helps families care for elderly parents with peace of mind, daily summaries, missed routine alerts, caregiver notes, emergency escalation, and shared calendars.

pages.title: Emergency Response
pages.primary_keyword: emergency response for seniors at home
pages.meta_description: Jude can help seniors ask for emergency help by voice, contact approved family members, escalate urgent situations, and support safer response at home.

pages.title: Communication Benefits
pages.meta_description: Jude helps elderly adults communicate with family, caregivers, doctors, friends, and neighbors using voice calls, video calls, messages, and shared updates.

pages.title: Mobility and Exercise Support
pages.meta_description: Jude supports senior mobility with gentle movement reminders, chair exercises, stretching prompts, walker reminders, balance routines, and fall-risk support.

pages.title: Reading and Technology Help
pages.primary_keyword: technology help for elderly at home
pages.meta_description: Jude helps seniors read messages, understand alerts, magnify text, explain forms, spot suspicious messages, and use technology in plain English.
